text: Where is the Jerry Falwell Library? I need to find a quiet place to study.
How do I get to the LaHaye Recreation Center? I want to go to the gym.
What events are happening at the Montview Student Union today?
Find me the fastest route to Williams Stadium for the football game.
Where can I find the School of Business? I have a class there in ten minutes.
Is the Center for Natural Sciences lab open on weekends?
Show me the way to the Residential Commons. I am a new student here.
What are the opening hours of the Hydaway Outdoor Recreation Center?
Where is the Indoor Track located? I have practice at six PM.
Tell me about the Center for Music and the Worship Arts.
How do I get to The Hill from the library? I need to find dining options.
Where can I find the Baseball Stadium? I want to watch the game tonight.
